name: Spice-Raising Cookies
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 375 degrees. Mix cookie mix, raisins, molasses, egg, ginger, cinnamon, cloves, and nutmeg. Stir in water. Drop dough by teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheet. Bake until almost no indentation remains when touched, about 9 minutes. Immediately remove from cookie sheet; cool. Frost with Frosting. Frosting: Mix sugar, butter, and vanilla. Beat in about 2 tablespoons milk until smooth and of spreading consistency.
